name: Skarab
short_description: Arise warrior, your kingdom has need of you. Wield ancient weaponry and harness arcane powers in your quest to liberate Egypt, rescue her royal highness, and exile Anubis to the afterlife.
detailed_description:
Make the Nile Run Red

  • An Armoury for the Ages. Rend your enemies with sharpened khopesh or swarm them with deadly locust plagues using your ancient and arcane arsenal. 

  • Egypt is your playground. Crawl across village rooftops and scour gargantuan pyramids in an adventure spanning the length of the Nile.

  • Tomb Rager. Plunder mysterious temples and tombs, navigating through traps and tunnels, and beating back the cult of Anubis.

  • Beasts, barbarians and belligerent Gods. Go up against enemies from both sides of the Duat!  

  • DOSMan! Find the titular time-and-space traveling mascot in every level, hoarding goodies for you to gorge on.

The latest and most ambitious release from bite-sized boomer shooter studio, DOSMan Games, Skarab combines frenetic combat with exploration and platforming to deliver an adventure inspired by the likes of Powerslave, Tomb Raider and Quake.
